name: worldbank_indicator
description: World Bank macroeconomic indicator for one or more countries. Common indicators: NY.GDP.MKTP.CD (GDP current US$), NY.GDP.PCAP.CD (GDP per capita), NY.GDP.MKTP.KD.ZG (GDP growth annual %), FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG (Inflation consumer prices), SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS (Unemployment rate), NE.TRD.GNFS.ZS (Trade % of GDP), GC.DOD.TOTL.GD.ZS (Central govt debt), SP.POP.TOTL (Population).

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country code, or 'all' (e.g. US, CHN, GB, all)
